problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
